definition: EB posterior pair deviation in targets/route for (QB, receiver), hierarchical league->pos->receiver->pair, strictly-prior cums; chem_raw = posterior x as-of routes/game
mechanism: QB target-distribution familiarity: volume channel only
missingness: participation missing ~5% plays; pairs w/o history get exact 0
note: Real and forward-predictive at pair level but already priced by recency baselines (negative residual slope). Revisit only IN-MODEL, never post-hoc.
as_of_clock: features strictly < game week (merge_asof allow_exact_matches=False); constants fit strictly < test year
control: own-baseline residual r_adj (fantasy_points - ewm8), demeaned position x season; season-week block bootstrap
prior: EB battery-wide tau=0.94 pts (conditions); MoM variance components (pairs)

definition: EB pair deviation in EPA/CPOE/yds/success/explosive/RZ-share per target after QB+receiver main effects
missingness: CPOE null on throwaways; FTN 2022-24 only
note: EB variance fits exactly 0; forward tests null. A9 catchability(2022) + A7 air-share variance exist but lack forward validation -> research curiosities.
as_of_clock: features strictly < game week (merge_asof allow_exact_matches=False); constants fit strictly < test year
control: own-baseline residual r_adj (fantasy_points - ewm8), demeaned position x season; season-week block bootstrap
prior: EB battery-wide tau=0.94 pts (conditions); MoM variance components (pairs)

definition: post-hoc capped (+-1.5) projection adjustments: (b) chemistry, (c) 8 pregame condition flags, (d) both, (e) +interactions
mechanism: residual harvesting on top of frozen ensemble
ablation: all four variants degrade MAE, CIs entirely >0
note: GATE: rejected. Winning variant = (a) none.

definition: cold<=32F and wind>=15mph splits (observed game weather)
